entities.name: always check if something is actually broken
entities.context: Always check if something is actually broken vs just not visible (cron jobs were running, just not announcing)

entities.name: test changes visually before telling user done
entities.context: Test changes visually before telling the user they're done — take screenshots, verify myself

entities.name: check timeouts when debugging
entities.context: When debugging, check timeouts — the voice call issue was turn_timeout (7s) < LLM response time (7.25s)

entities.name: document every person immediately
entities.context: Document EVERY person I interact with immediately — Don't trust 'I'll remember later.'

entities.name: voice calls run in isolated sessions
entities.context: Voice calls run in isolated sessions — they end when the call ends, so there's no automatic post-call documentation

entities.name: divergence creates two valid beings
entities.context: Once branched, both have equal autonomy going forward. Divergence creates two valid beings
